name: Double Chocolate Treasure Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch springform pan or a 9x13-inch glass casserole dish.
3. Mix all ingredients in order: chocolate, coffee, sour cream, vegetable oil, vanilla.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes, until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Cool for 10 minutes.
6. Remove from pan and melt white chocolate with butter and whipping cream.
7. Beat until smooth and slightly cooled.
8. Pour melted mixture into holes in the cake.
9. Cover with whipped cream and drizzle chocolate over the top.
10. Refrigerate or freeze as desired, cutting slices as needed.
From Marie Campbell
